title: Looking for Financial Analyst at LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
